textByHashes.4c8832f15c3086f38b8b76c81ae733c2dd684aa0: Yes, he's just down in the cellar. Are you one of his evil friends?
textByHashes.80553c12454e83a09e4f76fc36b7258089cbbd19: Well, I hope the two of you have a good time. Try not to make too much mess.
textByHashes.384291c32439c899d7e7cb58b5eb8617271e228e: Oh, that's good. He needs to spend time with more normal people. He hardly ever leaves that cellar, it can't be healthy.
textByHashes.2accde54bad6124fc05f0fa131053d70f87f68dc: I know he's a grown man who lives in his mum's basement and hardly ever sees daylight, but there's no need to be nasty about it.
textByHashes.f1c75f8a5687230217a9a23c7176badb4a2008d7: You can if you can find them. Dave's hell-rats stole them all!
textByHashes.77ea371ac73e316a1f1ed51d4ecea243131357a1: Hello again. Did you make your stew?
textByHashes.93cf0db8ebfa7576426e7a2afd76ddf4b37c1562: Oh, he's terribly hard to please, isn't he? I never know how to make food evil enough for him, I just have to try different things and see what he likes.
textByHashes.74dabd676dc8456e2c376fe6a52240653335b03a: Hello dearie. Did Dave like the stew you gave him?
textByHashes.d5503d1ccd2fd112c0fcdf95cab852703998569f: Hello again dearie. How are you doing?
textByHashes.ff838c24313a2643c84dce012a911ee7b2c1eeb3: Oh, it's not all that bad. It was a bit scary at first but as long as I don't go past the warning signs I'm all right.
textByHashes.6b61c02fda5c3efcfe9c3c46e81061ba542484d7: It's actually pretty quiet here. I used to live in Lumbridge and, let me tell you, that's the dangerous place for people like me.
textByHashes.c47904fe14e8d8235e9ad67313b01836fbd42cf4: Thieves were picking people's pockets with impunity, and killing them on the streets in broad daylight!
textByHashes.492579957ce8f83c99f115c6039bd52ccd9d435e: And there weren't even any guards to protect us! Not that the guards in the other cities do much good to protect people from what I've heard.
textByHashes.daed09e766e83389f393cdbf42ad359adcc50f1d: I just thank goodness I haven't got an Attack option any more! I wouldn't last five minutes!
textByHashes.a929da5894a697faf8b53c4daa9abadf11b4f278: Oh, I don't know really. He's always been evil, I think. Maybe growing up so close to the wilderness has affected him in some way.
textByHashes.c35f9d65a7b291b8597d8a53b9183b00abc0c2fa: When he was little he used to want to go into Edgeville dungeon. You know how kids are, always wanting to be dungeon adventurers! But he didn't want to be a hero, he wanted to be a monster!
textByHashes.d27ef638e0c6e7555f48b594ce8fa8be22fe348e: And then he spent all summer building a tree-house. Except it wasn't a tree-house, of course, it was his Tower of Fear!
textByHashes.a3e9bbd9d552e5cc7cf9daa7e1c942e14017b628: Of course I was hoping he'd have grown out of it by now and maybe even left home. But at least it keeps him happy.
textByHashes.d430db8685e8ac62ef6a95f4a90dac823e41698a: Oh, poor thing. The hell-rats do that, you know. I think a nice drink of milk would sort it out. Shall I give it one?
textByHashes.2c77ecbb272421ac959f4d716dcbbe3a33711c4e: Well, I suppose as long as the cat is all right, it doesn't matter what it looks like.
